title: RBI Standardizes Bank Lending to REITs and InvITs: Navigating the New Credit and Capital Framework
description:
New RBI directions allow banks to lend directly to eligible REITs and InvITs, ending years of regulatory uncertainty. The framework aims to improve access to capital while imposing strict prudential safeguards and lender protections.
The post RBI Standardizes Bank Lending to REITs and InvITs: Navigating the New Credit and Capital Framework appeared first on TaxGuru.
